    • 우분투 Wine 카카오톡 사진 이미지 스크린샷 붙여넣기

    • 구글의 아이콘 대개편: 6년 만의 실수 인정

    • 오디오 인터페이스 (Audio Interface)

    • 클렌징 밀크 (Cleansing Milk)

  • Programming Languages

    • 8.0. Statement Level Control Structures

    • Final Exam

21. Neural Networks and Deep Learning (3)

작성 2025. 11. 20.·수정 2025. 12. 28.

Training of Feedforward Nets

A Graphical Illustration on Softmax

Cross-Entropy and Maximum Likelihood Estimation

  • Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE)
    • Examples {xn}\{\mathbf{x}_n\}{xn​}: Ptrue(x)P_{\text{true}}(\mathbf{x})Ptrue​(x) (unknown)에서 independently drawn
    • Model: Pmodel(x; w)P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x};~\mathbf{w})Pmodel​(x; w) (parameters w\mathbf{w}w or θ\thetaθ)
    • Goal: Pmodel(x; w)P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x};~\mathbf{w})Pmodel​(x; w)가 Ptrue(x)P_{\text{true}}(\mathbf{x})Ptrue​(x) (strictly, Pempirical(x)P_{\text{empirical}}(\mathbf{x})Pempirical​(x))와 가장 유사한 w\mathbf{w}w 탐색
    • MLE principle

    wMLE=arg⁡max⁡wPmodel(x; w)\mathbf{w}_{\text{MLE}} = \arg\max_{\mathbf{w}} P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x};~\mathbf{w}) wMLE​=argwmax​Pmodel​(x; w)

    • Independence (Likelihood): wMLE=arg⁡max⁡w∏n=1NPmodel(xn; w)\mathbf{w}_{\text{MLE}} = \arg\max_{\mathbf{w}} \prod_{n=1}^{N} P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x}_n;~\mathbf{w})wMLE​=argmaxw​∏n=1N​Pmodel​(xn​; w)
    • Log likelihood (Computational stability): wMLE=arg⁡max⁡w∑n=1Nlog⁡Pmodel(xn; w)\mathbf{w}_{\text{MLE}} = \arg\max_{\mathbf{w}} \sum_{n=1}^{N} \log P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x}_n;~\mathbf{w})wMLE​=argmaxw​∑n=1N​logPmodel​(xn​; w)
  • Cross-entropy와 MLE의 관계

wMLE=arg⁡max⁡w∑n=1Nlog⁡Pmodel(xn; w)\mathbf{w}_{\text{MLE}} = \arg\max_{\mathbf{w}} \sum_{n=1}^{N} \log P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x}_n;~\mathbf{w}) wMLE​=argwmax​n=1∑N​logPmodel​(xn​; w)

  • Scaling (Argmax 불변):

wMLE=arg⁡max⁡w1N∑n=1Nlog⁡Pmodel(xn; w)\mathbf{w}_{\text{MLE}} = \arg\max_{\mathbf{w}} \frac{1}{N} \sum_{n=1}^{N} \log P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x}_n;~\mathbf{w}) wMLE​=argwmax​N1​n=1∑N​logPmodel​(xn​; w)

=arg⁡max⁡wEx∼Pempirical(x)[log⁡Pmodel(x; w)]= \arg\max_{\mathbf{w}} \mathbb{E}_{\mathbf{x} \sim P_{\text{empirical}}(\mathbf{x})}[\log P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x};~\mathbf{w})] =argwmax​Ex∼Pempirical​(x)​[logPmodel​(x; w)]

  • P(x)=Pempirical(x)P(\mathbf{x}) = P_{\text{empirical}}(\mathbf{x})P(x)=Pempirical​(x), Q(x)=Pmodel(x; w)Q(\mathbf{x}) = P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x};~\mathbf{w})Q(x)=Pmodel​(x; w)로 치환

wMLE=arg⁡max⁡wEP(x)[log⁡Q(x)]\mathbf{w}_{\text{MLE}} = \arg\max_{\mathbf{w}} \mathbb{E}_{P(\mathbf{x})}[\log Q(\mathbf{x})] wMLE​=argwmax​EP(x)​[logQ(x)]

=arg⁡min⁡w−EP(x)[log⁡Q(x)]=arg⁡min⁡wH(P,Q)= \arg\min_{\mathbf{w}} - \mathbb{E}_{P(\mathbf{x})}[\log Q(\mathbf{x})] = \arg\min_{\mathbf{w}} H(P, Q) =argwmin​−EP(x)​[logQ(x)]=argwmin​H(P,Q)

  • 결론
    • MLE를 사용한 wMLE\mathbf{w}_{\text{MLE}}wMLE​ 획득 문제는 Pempirical(x)P_{\text{empirical}}(\mathbf{x})Pempirical​(x)와 Pmodel(x; w)P_{\text{model}}(\mathbf{x};~\mathbf{w})Pmodel​(x; w) 간의 cross-entropy 최소화 문제와 동일

Parameter Optimization

  • Task: 선택된 E(w)E(\mathbf{w})E(w)를 최소화하는 weight vector w\mathbf{w}w 탐색
  • Global minimum: 모든 weight vector에 대해 error function의 가장 작은 값에 해당하는 minimum
  • Local minima: Error function의 더 높은 값에 해당하는 다른 모든 minima
  • Note: Neural network의 성공적 적용을 위해 global minimum 탐색이 필수적이 아닐 수 있음, 충분히 좋은 solution을 위해 여러 local minima 비교 필요

Forward Propagation & Backpropagation

  • Error backpropagation (or simply backprop)
    • Feed-forward neural network의 error function E(w)E(\mathbf{w})E(w)의 gradient ∇E(w)\nabla E(\mathbf{w})∇E(w)를 평가하는 효율적인 기술
    • Chain rule을 매우 효율적인 특정 연산 순서로 계산하는 algorithm
  • Our example
    • A simple layered network (sigmoidal hidden units, sum-of-squares error)
  • In a general feed-forward network,
    • 각 unit은 weighted sum 계산

    aj=∑iwjizia_j = \sum_i w_{ji} z_i aj​=i∑​wji​zi​

    • ziz_izi​: Unit jjj로 connection을 보내는 unit/input의 activation
    • wjiw_{ji}wji​: Connection과 연관된 weight
    • aja_jaj​는 nonlinear activation function h(⋅)h(\cdot)h(⋅)에 의해 변환되어 unit jjj의 activation zjz_jzj​ 생성

    zj=h(aj)z_j = h(a_j) zj​=h(aj​)

Forward Propagation

  • For each pattern in the training set
    • Input vector를 network에 제공
    • aja_jaj​와 zjz_jzj​의 연속 적용으로 모든 hidden unit 및 output unit의 activation 계산
    • 이 process는 forward propagation이라 불림 (정보의 forward flow)

Chain Rule of Calculus

  • Chain rule for scalars
    • y=g(x)y = g(x)y=g(x) 이고 z=f(g(x))=f(y)z = f(g(x)) = f(y)z=f(g(x))=f(y) 일 때

      dzdx=dzdy⋅dydx\frac{dz}{dx} = \frac{dz}{dy} \cdot \frac{dy}{dx} dxdz​=dydz​⋅dxdy​

  • Chain rule for vectors
    • x∈Rm, y∈Rn\mathbf{x} \in \mathbb{R}^m,~\mathbf{y} \in \mathbb{R}^nx∈Rm, y∈Rn, y=g(x)\mathbf{y} = g(\mathbf{x})y=g(x) 이고 z=f(y)z = f(\mathbf{y})z=f(y) 일 때

      ∂z∂xi=∑j∂z∂yj⋅∂yj∂xi\frac{\partial z}{\partial x_i} = \sum_j \frac{\partial z}{\partial y_j} \cdot \frac{\partial y_j}{\partial x_i} ∂xi​∂z​=j∑​∂yj​∂z​⋅∂xi​∂yj​​

    • Vector notation

      ∇xz=(∂y∂x)T∇yz\nabla_{\mathbf{x}} z = (\frac{\partial \mathbf{y}}{\partial \mathbf{x}})^T \nabla_{\mathbf{y}} z ∇x​z=(∂x∂y​)T∇y​z

    • ∂y∂x\frac{\partial \mathbf{y}}{\partial \mathbf{x}}∂x∂y​는 ggg의 n×mn \times mn×m Jacobian matrix

Backpropagation

  • EnE_nEn​의 wjiw_{ji}wji​에 대한 derivative 평가
    • EnE_nEn​은 wjiw_{ji}wji​에 대해 오직 summed input aja_jaj​를 통해서만 Dependant
    • Chain rule: ∂En∂wji=∂En∂aj⋅∂aj∂wji\frac{\partial E_n}{\partial w_{ji}} = \frac{\partial E_n}{\partial a_j} \cdot \frac{\partial a_j}{\partial w_{ji}}∂wji​∂En​​=∂aj​∂En​​⋅∂wji​∂aj​​
    • Notation (errors δ\deltaδ): δj≡∂En∂aj\delta_j \equiv \frac{\partial E_n}{\partial a_j}δj​≡∂aj​∂En​​
    • ∂aj∂wji=zi\frac{\partial a_j}{\partial w_{ji}} = z_i∂wji​∂aj​​=zi​
    • Result: ∂En∂wji=δj⋅zi\frac{\partial E_n}{\partial w_{ji}} = \delta_j \cdot z_i∂wji​∂En​​=δj​⋅zi​
  • ∂En∂wji=δj⋅zi\frac{\partial E_n}{\partial w_{ji}} = \delta_j \cdot z_i∂wji​∂En​​=δj​⋅zi​
    • Required derivative: Weight의 output end unit(jjj)의 δ\deltaδ 값과 input end unit(iii)의 ziz_izi​ 값을 곱하여 획득
  • Derivative 평가: Network의 각 hidden/output unit에 대한 δj\delta_jδj​ 값 계산 필요
  • For the output units (with L2 loss, assuming identity activation yj=ajy_j = a_jyj​=aj​)
    • En(w)=12∑k(yk−tk)2E_n(\mathbf{w}) = \frac{1}{2} \sum_k (y_k - t_k)^2En​(w)=21​∑k​(yk​−tk​)2
    • δj=yj−tj\delta_j = y_j - t_jδj​=yj​−tj​
  • To evaluate the δ\deltaδ's for hidden units,
    • Chain rule: δj≡∂En∂aj=∑k∂En∂ak⋅∂ak∂aj\delta_j \equiv \frac{\partial E_n}{\partial a_j} = \sum_k \frac{\partial E_n}{\partial a_k} \cdot \frac{\partial a_k}{\partial a_j}δj​≡∂aj​∂En​​=∑k​∂ak​∂En​​⋅∂aj​∂ak​​ (sum over units kkk to which unit jjj sends connections)
    • ∂ak∂aj=∂ak∂zj⋅∂zj∂aj=wkj⋅h′(aj)\frac{\partial a_k}{\partial a_j} = \frac{\partial a_k}{\partial z_j} \cdot \frac{\partial z_j}{\partial a_j} = w_{kj} \cdot h'(a_j)∂aj​∂ak​​=∂zj​∂ak​​⋅∂aj​∂zj​​=wkj​⋅h′(aj​)
  • Backpropagation formula
    • δj=h′(aj)∑kwkjδk\delta_j = h'(a_j) \sum_k w_{kj} \delta_kδj​=h′(aj​)∑k​wkj​δk​
    • Hidden unit의 δ\deltaδ: Network 상위 unit으로부터 δ\deltaδ를 backward로 propagate하여 획득

Automatic Differentiation

  • Gradient computation: Forward propagation의 symbolic expression에서 자동 추론 가능
  • Modern DL frameworks (Tensorflow, PyTorch, etc.): Backpropagation 자동 수행

A Simple Example of Backprop

  • Function: f(x, y, z)=(x+y)zf(x,~y,~z) = (x+y)zf(x, y, z)=(x+y)z
  • Intermediate variable: q=x+yq = x+yq=x+y, f=qzf = qzf=qz
  • Example values: x=−2, y=5, z=−4x = -2,~y = 5,~z = -4x=−2, y=5, z=−4
  • Forward propagation
    • q=x+y→q=−2+5=3q = x + y \quad \rightarrow \quad q = -2 + 5 = 3q=x+y→q=−2+5=3
    • f=qz→f=3×(−4)=−12f = qz \quad \rightarrow \quad f = 3 \times (-4) = -12f=qz→f=3×(−4)=−12
  • Backpropagation (computing gradients)

    • ∂f∂f=1\frac{\partial f}{\partial f} = 1∂f∂f​=1

    • ∂f∂z=q=3\frac{\partial f}{\partial z} = q = 3∂z∂f​=q=3 (Local gradient ∂f∂z=q\frac{\partial f}{\partial z} = q∂z∂f​=q)

    • ∂f∂q=z=−4\frac{\partial f}{\partial q} = z = -4∂q∂f​=z=−4 (Local gradient ∂f∂q=z\frac{\partial f}{\partial q} = z∂q∂f​=z)

    • ∂f∂y=∂f∂q⋅∂q∂y=(−4)⋅(1)=−4\frac{\partial f}{\partial y} = \frac{\partial f}{\partial q} \cdot \frac{\partial q}{\partial y} = (-4) \cdot (1) = -4∂y∂f​=∂q∂f​⋅∂y∂q​=(−4)⋅(1)=−4 (Upstream ∂f∂q\frac{\partial f}{\partial q}∂q∂f​, Local ∂q∂y=1\frac{\partial q}{\partial y} = 1∂y∂q​=1)

    • ∂f∂x=∂f∂q⋅∂q∂x=(−4)⋅(1)=−4\frac{\partial f}{\partial x} = \frac{\partial f}{\partial q} \cdot \frac{\partial q}{\partial x} = (-4) \cdot (1) = -4∂x∂f​=∂q∂f​⋅∂x∂q​=(−4)⋅(1)=−4 (Upstream ∂f∂q\frac{\partial f}{\partial q}∂q∂f​, Local ∂q∂x=1\frac{\partial q}{\partial x} = 1∂x∂q​=1)

  • Pattern: Gate (연산)는 local gradient를 계산하고, 이를 upstream gradient와 곱하여 downstream gradient 계산
최근 수정: 25. 12. 28. AM 4:42
Contributors: kmbzn
